name: RFQ Generator
description: Turn sourcing requirements into a structured, ready-to-send Request for Quotation — scope, specification table, evaluation criteria, submission rules, and a non-binding disclaimer — plus a list of open items procurement must still fill in.
author: accilium

variables.name: REQUIREMENTS
variables.description: What needs to be sourced — scope, specifications, quantities, delivery location/timeline.
variables.example: 500 units of industrial safety helmets, EN 397 certified, delivery to Linz warehouse by 2026-09-01

variables.name: EVALUATION_CRITERIA
variables.description: How quotes will be judged, with weighting if already decided.

variables.name: SUBMISSION_RULES
variables.description: Deadline, submission format, and required documents.
variables.example: Submit by 2026-08-01 via email as PDF; must include company registration and product certification

example_input: REQUIREMENTS: 500 certified safety helmets, delivery Sept 1; EVALUATION_CRITERIA: price 40/delivery 30/compliance 30; SUBMISSION_RULES: deadline Aug 1
